character.definition: a rite or service, (same as 娥) good; beautiful, a common name for a girl
to melt or cast (metal) by using a mold; (non-classical form of 寫) to write; to draw
a pure woman; name of a goddess of frost and snow
(same as 款) an item, article; clause, fund
a mythical animal that eats its mother when it is born; Manchurian tiger
seed of Job's tears; lotus seed
to be exiled; delay payment for
